_authority: Public summary: METHODOLOGY.md; frozen private source retained but excluded from this repository
k1_floor_citation: METHODOLOGY.md — the confirmatory reduction floor was fixed at 20 percentage points before data collection and does not move after freeze
m0_noninferiority_margin_citation: M0 non-inferiority margin = 5.56pp absolute (~100/18, one task's completion out of the 18-task primary battery); fixed before data collection.
_vg_quanta_citation: Validity thresholds were fixed before data collection: vg1=any positive separation, vg2=33.4pp (>1 of 3 negative controls), vg5=16.7pp (>3 of 18 runs).
_ci_method_note: ci_method_primary selects BCa, percentile, or Newcombe. BCa is primary because the plain percentile bootstrap under-covers at n=18; percentile and Newcombe are still reported as labeled sensitivity analyses over the same deterministic data.
_m0_noninferiority_note: The 5.56pp point-estimate margin equals one task out of 18. The M0 interval is always reported, but using its lower bound as the gate at this sample size would turn a one-task tolerance into a much stricter near-equality requirement. CI mode remains available for a larger study.
